Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); k=data.get\('knowledge',{}\); a=k.get\('articles',None\); print\('knowledge keys:', list\(k.keys\(\)\)\); print\('articles keys:', list\(a.keys\(\)\) if a else 'MISSING'\); print\('sectionTitle:', a.get\('sectionTitle','MISSING'\) if a else 'N/A'\); print\('readMinutes:', a.get\('readMinutes','MISSING'\) if a else 'N/A'\); items=a.get\('items',[]\) if a else []; print\('item count:', len\(items\)\); print\(\); [print\(f\\"  [{i}] id={item.get\('id','MISSING'\)} fields={sorted\(item.keys\(\)\)}\\"\) for i,item in enumerate\(items\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('JSON is valid'\); k = data.get\('knowledge', {}\); articles = k.get\('articles', {}\); items = articles.get\('items', []\); print\(f'Article count: {len\(items\)}'\); print\(f'sectionTitle: {articles.get\(\\"sectionTitle\\"\)}'\); print\(f'readMinutes: {articles.get\(\\"readMinutes\\"\)}'\)")

Bash(node -e "const json = require\('./messages/he.json'\); const knowledgeKeys = Object.keys\(json.knowledge\); console.log\('Knowledge object keys in order:'\); knowledgeKeys.forEach\(\(k, i\) => console.log\(\\`  [\\${i}] \\${k}\\`\)\); console.log\('\\\\nLast 5 keys:'\); knowledgeKeys.slice\(-5\).forEach\(k => console.log\(\\`  - \\${k}\\`\)\);")
